LessonsLearnedCapture type has no sourceRevisionIds field. drawing_revision_superseded events exist (revisionDetectionService) but no knowledge invalidation/revalidation hook. Cross-ref timeline tracks revisionId but is not linked to knowledge template chain. VariationEvidenceLink supports entityType drawing_revision but knowledge pipeline does not consume it. Superseded drawing invalidation and approved-knowledge revalidation on source revision change are not implemented.

securityInterrupts.title: SECURITY DEFINER write_audit_entry callable without project membership check
securityInterrupts.rationale: Live Security Advisor triage 2026-07-10: public.write_audit_entry(...) is SECURITY DEFINER with search_path=public, EXECUTE granted to authenticated (and anon via PUBLIC). Body only guards auth.uid() IS NOT NULL ГѓЖ’Г†вЂ™ГѓвЂ Гўв‚¬в„ўГѓЖ’Гўв‚¬ЕЎГѓвЂљГ‚ВўГѓЖ’Г†вЂ™ГѓвЂљГ‚ВўГѓЖ’Г‚ВўГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕЎГ‚В¬ГѓвЂ¦Г‚ВЎГѓЖ’Гўв‚¬ЕЎГѓвЂљГ‚В¬ГѓЖ’Г†вЂ™ГѓвЂљГ‚ВўГѓЖ’Г‚ВўГѓВўГўвЂљВ¬Г…ВЎГѓвЂљГ‚В¬ГѓЖ’Гўв‚¬ЕЎГѓвЂљГ‚Вќ any signed-in user can insert audit_log rows for arbitrary project_id (audit forgery / data-integrity).
